mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (video_id, user_id, content, create_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, u.username AS username FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = ? ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET likes_count = likes_count + ? WHERE id = ?
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE video_id = ?

SELECT c.id, c.video_id AS videoId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.likes_count AS likesCount, u.nickname AS nickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.video_id = ? ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
